title: Mandala

statement.markdown:
## CSSBattle Challenge: Recreate the Target Design

Your objective is to recreate the target design mockup in pure HTML and CSS with the lowest character count possible.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* Recreate the target design shown in the reference image.

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment and shape proportions.

constraints: Must match the target design mockup visually

gradingCriteria.description: Check that the rendered output matches the target design pixel-for-pixel.

judgeConfig.referenceSolution:
<style>
  body {
    background: radial-gradient(1px at 50% 75px, #0000 65px, #243D83 65px 85px, #0000 1%),
      radial-gradient(1px at 50% 225px, #0000 65px, #243D83 65px 85px, #0000 1%),
      radial-gradient(1px at 125px, #0000 65px, #243D83 65px 85px, #0000 1%),
      radial-gradient(1px at 275px, #0000 65px, #243D83 65px 85px, #0000 1%),
      radial-gradient(200px, #6592CF 100px, #243D83 1%)
  }
</style>
